hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭；【FINANCE】摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款；【CRYPTO】Ripple 希望扩大在巴西的加密货币和支付服务。

items.title: Markets' hopes for Fed interest rate cuts are rapidly fading away
items.summary: As both energy prices and inflation fears pop higher, expectations for cuts are sliding lower.
items.title_zh: 市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭
items.summary_zh: 随着能源价格和通胀担忧的加剧，削减开支的预期正在下降。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
items.summary: JPMorgan's move shows that the biggest U.S. bank by assets wants to get ahead of potential turbulence involving private credit loans to software companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，按资产计算，这家美国最大的银行希望在涉及向软件公司提供私人信贷贷款的潜在动荡之前先行一步。

items.title: Ripple looks to expand crypto and payment services in Brazil
items.summary: The blockchain firm is adding custody, payments and brokerage tools for digital asset management and tokenization as it plans to apply for regulatory approval from the central bank.
items.title_zh: Ripple 希望扩大在巴西的加密货币和支付服务
items.summary_zh: 该区块链公司正在增加用于数字资产管理和代币化的托管、支付和经纪工具，并计划向央行申请监管批准。

items.title: Citigroup cuts BTC and ETH targets as U.S. crypto legislation stalls
items.summary: The Wall Street investment bank cited slower ETF flows, weak network activity and a narrowing window for U.S. regulatory catalysts.
items.title_zh: 由于美国加密立法停滞，花旗集团削减了 BTC 和 ETH 目标
items.summary_zh: 这家华尔街投资银行指出，ETF 流量放缓、网络活动疲弱以及美国监管催化剂窗口缩小。

items.title: Stand With Crypto stakeholders ramp up pressure on Senate Banking Committee on DeFi protections, stablecoin rewards
items.summary: Stand With Crypto stakeholders from states across the country sent a letter this week to senators urging them to protect DeFi.
items.title_zh: 与加密货币利益相关者一起就 DeFi 保护和稳定币奖励向参议院银行委员会施加压力
items.summary_zh: 来自全国各州的“与加密货币站在一起”利益相关者本周致信参议员，敦促他们保护 DeFi。

items.title: Bitcoin beat the S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite and gold since the start of the Iran war
items.summary: ProShares' Simeon Hyman is highlighting a bullish bitcoin trend.
items.title_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，比特币击败了标准普尔 500 指数、纳斯达克综合指数和黄金
items.summary_zh: ProShares 的 Simeon Hyman 强调了看涨的比特币趋势。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Says It Has Killed Iran’s De Facto Leader
items.summary: Ali Larijani, Iran’s top security official, was killed in an overnight strike, the Israeli military said. His death would deal another severe blow to Iran’s power structure.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：以色列称已杀死伊朗事实上的领导人
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方称，伊朗最高安全官员阿里·拉里贾尼在夜间袭击中身亡。他的去世将对伊朗的权力结构造成又一次严重打击。

items.title: Apollo's John Zito questions private equity's software valuations: 'All the marks are wrong'
items.summary: While Wall Street figures have flagged risks in private credit, Apollo's Zito is among the first within private credit to candidly acknowledge weakness.
items.title_zh: Apollo 的 John Zito 质疑私募股权公司的软件估值：“所有标记都是错误的”
items.summary_zh: 尽管华尔街的数据已经指出了私人信贷的风险，但阿波罗的 Zito 是私人信贷领域最先坦诚承认疲软的人之一。

items.title: Holiday spending, export demand drive China’s economic momentum as Iran war headwinds loom
items.summary: Beijing tamped down its GDP growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争逆风逼近，假期消费、出口需求推动中国经济增长
items.summary_zh: 北京将今年的GDP增长目标下调至4.5%至5%，这是自20世纪90年代初以来有记录以来最不雄心勃勃的目标。

items.title: Dividend stocks are catching up to tech stocks on a key earnings metric at a critical time for the market
items.summary: Dividend stocks are closing the earnings growth gap with tech stocks, a reason for investors seeking safety in a volatile market to favor income opportunities.
items.title_zh: 在市场的关键时刻，股息股在一项关键盈利指标上正在追赶科技股
items.summary_zh: 股息股正在缩小与科技股的盈利增长差距，这是投资者在动荡的市场中寻求安全以青睐收入机会的原因。

items.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase's push to become the startup world’s new Silicon Valley Bank
items.summary: For JPMorgan Chase, winning the niche of startup banking from rivals is about more than just gaining deposits: It's a bet to future-proof the largest U.S. bank.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通致力于成为初创企业界的新硅谷银行
items.summary_zh: 对于摩根大通来说，从竞争对手手中赢得初创银行业务的利基市场不仅仅是获得存款：这是对美国最大银行面向未来的赌注。

items.title: Trump seeks to delay meeting with Xi in China
items.summary: The escalating war in Iran has overshadowed many of the US' foreign policy objectives
items.title_zh: 特朗普寻求推迟与习近平在中国的会面
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争不断升级给美国的许多外交政策目标蒙上阴影

items.title: Utah mother who wrote book about grief found guilty of poisoning husband
items.summary: A jury found that Kouri Richins killed her husband in March 2022 by poisoning him with a fentanyl-laced drink.
items.title_zh: 犹他州母亲写了一本关于悲伤的书，被判毒害丈夫
items.summary_zh: 陪审团发现，Kouri Richins 于 2022 年 3 月用含有芬太尼的饮料毒死了她的丈夫。

items.title: And the burger goes to... Michael B Jordan marks Oscars win at In-N-Out
items.summary: Hours after winning best actor, Jordan joins an exclusive list of famous faces to celebrate an Oscar victory with a burger.
items.title_zh: 汉堡送给...迈克尔·B·乔丹 (Michael B Jordan) 在 In-N-Out 上赢得奥斯卡奖
items.summary_zh: 获得最佳男主角奖几小时后，乔丹加入了名人面孔的独家名单，用汉堡庆祝奥斯卡胜利。

items.title: Columbia University protester released after one year in immigration custody
items.summary: Federal officials say Leqaa Kordia overstayed her student visa. Her lawyer says she was targeted for pro-Palestinian activism.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚大学抗议者在被移民拘留一年后获释
items.summary_zh: 联邦官员表示，莱卡·科尔迪亚的学生签证逾期居留。她的律师称，她因亲巴勒斯坦激进主义而成为目标。

items.title: Inside the Supply Line Delivering American Guns to Mexican Cartels
items.summary: A surge of weapons is flowing from the U.S. to Mexico. These firearms — sourced from gun shops, shows, websites and apps — are funneled across the border to fuel the country’s most violent crimes.
items.title_zh: 向墨西哥贩毒集团运送美国枪支的供应线内部
items.summary_zh: 大量武器正在从美国流向墨西哥。这些枪支来自枪支商店、表演、网站和应用程序，跨境流动，助长了该国最暴力的犯罪活动。

items.title: Sucked Into War, Gulf Countries Face the Limits of U.S. Security Guarantees
items.summary: Barraged by Iranian attacks and questioning the value of security ties with the United States, nations in the Gulf have turned to Ukraine, Australia and Italy for help.
items.title_zh: 陷入战争的海湾国家面临美国安全保障的限制
items.summary_zh: 由于受到伊朗袭击以及对与美国安全关系价值的质疑，海湾国家已向乌克兰、澳大利亚和意大利寻求帮助。

items.title: What the Iran War Means for the U.S.-China Relationship
items.summary: With the Xi-Trump summit almost certainly delayed, and tensions rising over the war in Iran, vital issues for both the U.S. and China are also being cast into uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争对中美关系意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 由于习近平与特朗普的峰会几乎肯定会推迟，加上伊朗战争引发的紧张局势加剧，对美国和中国来说至关重要的问题也陷入了不确定性。

items.title: As American Bombers Take Off From R.A.F. Fairford in UK, Iraq War Looms Large
items.summary: R.A.F. Fairford was the site of repeated antiwar protests during the Iraq war in 2003. Now it is being used again as a base for U.S. bombing missions in the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 当美国轰炸机从英国皇家空军起飞时英国费尔福德，伊拉克战争迫在眉睫
items.summary_zh: 英国皇家空军费尔福德是 2003 年伊拉克战争期间多次反战抗议的场所。现在，它再次被用作美国在中东执行轰炸任务的基地。

items.title: What Do Africans Think of Trump’s Travel Ban List?
items.summary: The restrictions on half the continent have been called racist and unfair. “We don’t come to the United States because we’re running away,” one N.B.A. fan said.
items.title_zh: 非洲人如何看待特朗普的旅行禁令清单？
items.summary_zh: 对半个大陆的限制被称为种族主义和不公平。 “我们来美国不是因为我们要逃跑，”一位 NBA 球员说。范说。

items.title: Intrigue, Power Plays and Rivalries: Inside the Rise of Mojtaba Khamenei
items.summary: The weeklong fight over Iran’s next leader pitted the Revolutionary Guards against moderates. The generals won, but only over spirited resistance.
items.title_zh: 阴谋、权力斗争和竞争：莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊崛起的内部
items.summary_zh: 围绕伊朗下一任领导人的为期一周的斗争让革命卫队与温和派展开了对立。将军们赢得了胜利，但只是战胜了激烈的抵抗。

items.title: U.S. regional banks building tokenized deposit network on ZKsync to rival stablecoins
items.summary: The Cari Network is targeting a 2026 rollout as banks test issuance, transfers and redemption of digital deposits. Participating banks include Huntington Bancshares, First Horizon, M&T Bank, KeyCorp and Old National Bancorp.
items.title_zh: 美国地区银行在 ZKsync 上构建代币化存款网络以与稳定币竞争
items.summary_zh: Cari Network 的目标是在 2026 年推出，届时银行将测试数字存款的发行、转账和赎回。参与银行包括 Huntington Bancshares、First Horizo​​n、M&T Bank、KeyCorp 和 Old National Bancorp。

items.title: PayPal expands PYUSD stablecoin access to 70 markets
items.summary: PayPal has expanded access to its PYUSD stablecoin to 70 markets, enabling wallet access, transfers, and rewards for eligible users.
items.title_zh: PayPal 将 PYUSD 稳定币扩展到 70 个市场
items.summary_zh: PayPal 已将其 PYUSD 稳定币的使用范围扩大到 70 个市场，为符合条件的用户提供钱包访问、转账和奖励。

items.title: Vietnam prepares to restrict overseas crypto trading as banks, brokers bid for new local licenses: report
items.summary: Vietnam plans to restrict citizens from overseas crypto trading as banks and brokerages compete for new domestic licenses.
items.title_zh: 随着银行、经纪商竞标新的本地许可证，越南准备限制海外加密货币交易：报告
items.summary_zh: 随着银行和经纪公司争夺新的国内许可证，越南计划限制公民进行海外加密货币交易。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #23.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 23 位。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: New method could increase LLM training efficiency
items.summary: By leveraging idle computing time, researchers can double the speed of model training while preserving accuracy.
items.title_zh: 新方法可以提高LLM培训效率
items.summary_zh: 通过利用空闲计算时间，研究人员可以将模型训练的速度提高一倍，同时保持准确性。

items.title: Lobster buffet: China’s tech firms feast on OpenClaw as companies race to deploy AI agents
items.summary: China-based usage of OpenClaw has already topped that of the U.S., while driving demand for Chinese lower-cost AI models.
items.title_zh: 龙虾自助餐：中国科技公司竞相部署人工智能代理，享受 OpenClaw 盛宴
items.summary_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 使用量已经超过美国，同时推动了对中国低成本人工智能模型的需求。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) drops 4.1%, leading index lower
items.summary: Sui (SUI) joined Uniswap (UNI) as an underperformer, declining 4% from Monday.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Uniswap (UNI) 下跌 4.1%，领先指数走低
items.summary_zh: Sui (SUI) 与 Uniswap (UNI) 一样表现不佳，较周一下跌 4%。

items.title: Bitcoin hits a wall at $75,000 while onchain energy markets run hot
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for March 17, 2026
items.title_zh: 比特币触及 75,000 美元，而链上能源市场火热
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月 17 日天气预报

items.title: Cango is selling off its bitcoin stash to pay down debt and fund an AI makeover
items.summary: The company sold 4,451 BTC in February to cut debt and fund AI infrastructure pivot.
items.title_zh: Cango 正在出售其比特币储备以偿还债务并为人工智能改造提供资金
items.summary_zh: 该公司在 2 月份出售了 4,451 比特币，以削减债务并为人工智能基础设施转型提供资金。

items.title: Bitcoin consolidation seen with BTC remaining 'overbought' after pullback
items.summary: Crypto markets cooled after Monday's rally, with bitcoin eyeing support near $72,000–$74,000 even as derivatives positioning remains broadly bullish and altcoins see deeper profit-taking.
items.title_zh: 比特币盘整，回调后仍处于“超买”状态
items.summary_zh: 加密货币市场在周一上涨后降温，比特币关注 72,000-74,000 美元附近的支撑位，尽管衍生品头寸仍然普遍看涨，而山寨币则出现了更深的获利了结。

items.title: Cango posts $452.8 million net loss in first year as bitcoin miner
items.summary: Cango’s first full mining year ended with a $452.8 million net loss, selling bitcoin to repay debt and fund its AI pivot.
items.title_zh: Cango 作为比特币矿商第一年净亏损 4.528 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Cango 的第一个完整采矿年度以 4.528 亿美元的净亏损结束，该公司出售比特币以偿还债务并为其人工智能转型提供资金。

items.title: Bitcoin rally tests $75,000 level in massive short squeeze
items.summary: The crypto market saw $609 million in liquidations in the past 24 hours, including $485 million in short positions, Coinglass data showed.
items.title_zh: 比特币反弹在大规模空头挤压中测试 75,000 美元水平
items.summary_zh: Coinglass 数据显示，过去 24 小时内，加密货币市场的清算额为 6.09 亿美元，其中空头头寸为 4.85 亿美元。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.title_zh: Codex 安全性：现在处于研究预览阶段
items.summary_zh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用程序安全代理，可分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的噪音来检测、验证和修补复杂的漏洞。

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
items.title_zh: Descript 如何实现大规模多语言视频配音
items.summary_zh: Descript 使用 OpenAI 模型来扩展多语言视频配音，优化含义和时间的翻译，使配音的语音在不同语言中听起来都很自然。

items.title: The First Healthcare Robotics Dataset and Foundational Physical AI Models for Healthcare Robotics
items.title_zh: 第一个医疗保健机器人数据集和医疗保健机器人基础物理人工智能模型

items.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
items.title_zh: PRX 第 3 部分 — 在 24 小时内训练文本到图像模型！

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.title_zh: 谷歌和马萨诸塞州人工智能中心正在为联邦启动一项新的人工智能培训计划。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在与马萨诸塞州人工智能中心合作，为每个 Baystater 提供免费的谷歌人工智能培训机会。

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.title_zh: 通过 Translate 中全新的人工智能驱动的更新，获取更多背景信息并更深入地理解翻译。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译中的新替代方案“理解”和“询问”按钮可帮助您应对自然语言的复杂性。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁
items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions
items.summary: A new approach could help users know whether to trust a model’s predictions in safety-critical applications like health care and autonomous driving.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能模型解释其预测的能力
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以帮助用户知道是否信任模型在医疗保健和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的预测。

items.title: China talks up oil sufficiency as Trump seeks Beijing's help on securing Hormuz energy route
items.summary: The statistics bureau said that China's energy supply is "relatively strong," while announcing an uptick in domestic production.
items.title_zh: 特朗普寻求北京帮助确保霍尔木兹能源路线安全，中国谈论石油供应充足
items.summary_zh: 国家统计局表示，中国能源供应“相对强劲”，同时宣布国内产量有所增加。

items.title: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump's 'big beautiful bill'
items.summary: Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law.
items.title_zh: 油价飙升可能会消除特朗普“大而美丽的法案”带来的好处
items.summary_zh: 华尔街的估计表明，如果油价长期保持高位，消费者从新税法中得到的损失将与他们从新税法中获得的收益一样多。

items.title: Trump says presidents 'should not have learning disabilities' as he mocks Newsom's dyslexia
items.summary: The National Center for Learning Disabilities said it was "disturbed" by the president's remarks.
items.title_zh: 特朗普嘲笑纽瑟姆患有阅读障碍，称总统“不应该有学习障碍”
items.summary_zh: 国家学习障碍中心表示对总统的言论感到“不安”。

items.title: Pakistan air strike kills at least 100 at Kabul drug rehab centre
items.summary: Some of the bodies were injured beyond recognition, forensic laboratory sources told the BBC.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦空袭喀布尔戒毒中心造成至少100人死亡
items.summary_zh: 法医实验室消息人士告诉英国广播公司，一些尸体伤势无法辨认。

items.title: Suspected suicide attacks kill at least 23 in north-east Nigeria
items.summary: Multiple blasts struck some of the Maiduguri's busiest locations on Monday evening.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚东北部疑似自杀式袭击造成至少23人死亡
items.summary_zh: 周一晚间，迈杜古里一些最繁忙的地点发生多起爆炸。

items.title: US west coast prepares for 'dangerous' heatwave in early spring
items.summary: Severe weather is plaguing the US from coast to coast, bringing a mix of extreme heat and bitter cold.
items.title_zh: 美国西海岸为早春“危险”热浪做好准备
items.summary_zh: 恶劣的天气正在困扰着美国从东海岸到西海岸，带来了酷热和严寒。

items.title: Sri Lanka declares Wednesdays off as Asian countries try to conserve fuel
items.summary: This is the latest in a series of measures undertaken by Asian countries which rely on oil from the Gulf.
items.title_zh: 亚洲国家努力节省燃料 斯里兰卡宣布周三休息
items.summary_zh: 这是依赖海湾石油的亚洲国家采取的一系列措施中的最新一项。

items.title: Millions without electricity as Cuba's power grid collapses
items.summary: Cuba's chronic fuel shortages have been exacerbated by a US blockade on oil shipments to the island.
items.title_zh: 古巴电网崩溃导致数百万人断电
items.summary_zh: 美国对古巴石油运输的封锁加剧了古巴长期的燃料短缺。

items.title: Hundreds Dead in Pakistani Airstrike on Kabul, Officials in Afghanistan Say
items.summary: The attack hit a drug rehabilitation facility, Afghanistan said, suggesting that its victims included civilians. Pakistan said it had targeted an ammunitions depot.
items.title_zh: 阿富汗官员称巴基斯坦对喀布尔的空袭造成数百人死亡
items.summary_zh: 阿富汗表示，这次袭击袭击了一个戒毒所，这表明受害者包括平民。巴基斯坦称其袭击目标是一个弹药库。

items.title: Europe Has Helped the U.S. Protect Shipping. The Strait of Hormuz Is Different.
items.summary: European Union ministers and leaders pushed back on ideas to protect the strait, including expanding a maritime operation already in place in the Red Sea.
items.title_zh: 欧洲帮助美国保护航运。霍尔木兹海峡则不同。
items.summary_zh: 欧盟部长和领导人拒绝了保护该海峡的想法，包括扩大红海现有的海上行动。

items.title: As Carney Seeks New Alliances for Canada, He Looks Away on Human Rights
items.summary: Canada’s prime minister chooses pragmatism in a turbulent world, which means doing business with countries that do not share Canada’s democratic values. Some critics see this as weakness.
items.title_zh: 当卡尼为加拿大寻求新联盟时，他对人权问题视而不见
items.summary_zh: 加拿大总理在动荡的世界中选择了实用主义，这意味着与不认同加拿大民主价值观的国家做生意。一些批评家认为这是弱点。

items.title: Argentina joins growing list of countries blocking Polymarket access
items.summary: The ruling directs internet providers to block access to the site, and Apple and Google to remove or restrict Polymarket's mobile apps.
items.title_zh: 阿根廷加入了越来越多的阻止 Polymarket 准入的国家行列
items.summary_zh: 该裁决指示互联网提供商阻止对该网站的访问，苹果和谷歌则删除或限制 Polymarket 的移动应用程序。

items.title: Mastercard agrees to buy stablecoin platform BVNK for up to $1.8 billion
items.summary: Payments giant Mastercard moves to bridge fiat and crypto with $1.8 billion acquisition of the U.K. based stablecoin startup.
items.title_zh: 万事达卡同意以最多 18 亿美元收购稳定币平台 BVNK
items.summary_zh: 支付巨头万事达卡 (Mastercard) 以 18 亿美元收购了这家英国稳定币初创公司，旨在搭建法定货币和加密货币之间的桥梁。

items.title: PayPal expands its stablecoin into 70 markets
items.summary: The payments giant says the dollar-backed PYUSD token will enable cheaper cross-border transfers and faster settlement for merchants.
items.title_zh: PayPal 将其稳定币扩展到 70 个市场
items.summary_zh: 这家支付巨头表示，美元支持的 PYUSD 代币将为商家带来更便宜的跨境转账和更快的结算。

items.title: Mastercard to acquire stablecoin infrastructure firm BVNK for up to $1.8 billion
items.summary: Mastercard said it will acquire stablecoin infrastructure firm BVNK for up to $1.8 billion to link onchain and fiat payment rails.
items.title_zh: 万事达卡将以高达 18 亿美元的价格收购稳定币基础设施公司 BVNK
items.summary_zh: 万事达卡表示，将以高达 18 亿美元的价格收购稳定币基础设施公司 BVNK，以连接链上和法定支付轨道。

items.title: Argentina orders nationwide block of Polymarket as scrutiny of prediction markets grows: report
items.summary: Argentina has ordered a nationwide block of Polymarket, adding to growing scrutiny of prediction market platforms globally.
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场审查的加强，阿根廷下令在全国范围内建立Polymarket街区：报告
items.summary_zh: 阿根廷已下令在全国范围内建立 Polymarket 区块，加强了全球对预测市场平台日益严格的审查。

items.title: Former LA deputy gets 5 years in prison for aiding ‘Crypto Godfather’ extortion scheme
items.summary: Michael David Coberg, a former deputy and helicopter pilot, received a 63-month sentence and was ordered to pay $127,000 in restitution.
items.title_zh: 前洛杉矶副警因协助“加密教父”敲诈勒索计划被判入狱 5 年
items.summary_zh: 前副官兼直升机飞行员迈克尔·大卫·科伯格 (Michael David Coberg) 被判处 63 个月监禁，并被责令支付 127,000 美元的赔偿金。

items.title: Crypto.com partners with South Korea’s largest payment gateway provider
items.summary: The two plan to allow foreign tourists to use digital assets for payments on South Korean goods and services.
items.title_zh: Crypto.com 与韩国最大的支付网关提供商合作
items.summary_zh: 两人计划允许外国游客使用数字资产支付韩国商品和服务。

items.title: Messari CEO steps down alongside mass layoffs in AI pivot
items.summary: Several other crypto companies have recently conducted layoffs, including OP Labs, Block Inc., and Gemini exchange.
items.title_zh: Messari 首席执行官辞职，人工智能转向大规模裁员
items.summary_zh: 其他几家加密货币公司最近也进行了裁员，包括OP Labs、Block Inc.和Gemini交易所。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Codex 安全性不包括 SAST 报告
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨为什么 Codex Security 不依赖传统的 SAST，而是使用人工智能驱动的约束推理和验证来发现真正的漏洞，并减少误报。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.title_zh: 设计人工智能代理以抵抗即时注入
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 如何通过限制危险行为和保护代理工作流程中的敏感数据来防御即时注入和社会工程。

items.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.
items.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中学习数学和科学的新方法
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了数学和科学的交互式视觉解释，帮助学生实时探索公式、变量和概念。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
items.summary: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Promptfoo
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 正在收购 Promptfoo，这是一个人工智能安全平台，可帮助企业在开发过程中识别和修复人工智能系统中的漏洞。

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Granite 4.0 1B Speech: Compact, Multilingual, and Built for the Edge
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 1B 语音：紧凑、多语言、专为边缘而打造

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Every Dimension
items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations
items.title_zh: 将机器人人工智能引入嵌入式平台：数据集记录、VLA 微调和设备上优化

items.title: Introducing Modular Diffusers - Composable Building Blocks for Diffusion Pipelines
items.title_zh: 引入模块化扩散器 - 用于扩散管道的可组合构建块

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
items.summary: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.
items.title_zh: 询问技术专家：人工智能如何理解我的视觉搜索？
items.summary_zh: 详细了解搜索中用于视觉搜索的 AI 模式的查询扇出方法。

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
items.summary_zh: AI 模式下的 Canvas 现已可供美国所有人使用，此外，它现在还可以帮助您起草文档或构建交互式工具。

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: Learn more about Google DeepMind’s Project Genie and how to write prompts to create your own worlds.
items.title_zh: 利用这 4 个技巧在 Project Genie 中创建新世界
items.summary_zh: 详细了解 Google DeepMind 的 Project Genie 以及如何编写提示来创建您自己的世界。

items.title: 3 Questions: On the future of AI and the mathematical and physical sciences
items.summary: Professor Jesse Thaler describes a vision for a two-way bridge between artificial intelligence and the mathematical and physical sciences — one that promises to advance both.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：关于人工智能以及数学和物理科学的未来
items.summary_zh: 杰西·塞勒教授描述了在人工智能与数学和物理科学之间架起一座双向桥梁的愿景——这一桥梁有望推动两者的发展。

items.title: New MIT class uses anthropology to improve chatbots
items.summary: MIT computer science students design AI chatbots to help young users become more social, and socially confident.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新课程利用人类学来改进聊天机器人
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机科学专业的学生设计人工智能聊天机器人，帮助年轻用户变得更加社交和社交自信。

items.title: A better method for planning complex visual tasks
items.summary: A new hybrid system could help robots navigate in changing environments or increase the efficiency of multirobot assembly teams.
items.title_zh: 规划复杂视觉任务的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 新的混合系统可以帮助机器人在不断变化的环境中导航或提高多机器人装配团队的效率。

items.title: A “ChatGPT for spreadsheets” helps solve difficult engineering challenges faster
items.summary: The approach could help engineers tackle extremely complex design problems, from power grid optimization to vehicle design.
items.title_zh: “电子表格ChatGPT”有助于更快地解决困难的工程挑战
items.summary_zh: 该方法可以帮助工程师解决极其复杂的设计问题，从电网优化到车辆设计。

items.title: Featured video: Coding for underwater robotics
items.summary: Lincoln Laboratory intern Ivy Mahncke developed and tested algorithms to help human divers and robots navigate underwater.
items.title_zh: 特色视频：水下机器人编码
items.summary_zh: 林肯实验室实习生 Ivy Mahncke 开发并测试了帮助人类潜水员和机器人在水下导航的算法。
